description: Project-specific debugging environments, logging rules, storage targets, and test commands. AI agents must use these rules during root-cause analysis and code generation.

logging_rules.description: Unified Logger system rules. The Logger class auto-manages emoji icons — agents and developers MUST NOT manually insert emoji into log messages.

Logger.debug(msg, ctx?).use_for: 開發除錯（受 enableDebugLogs 開關控制）

Logger.error(msg, ctx?).use_for: 錯誤記錄（始終顯示，不受 debug 開關影響）

emoji_rules.rule: 除非需要「搜索 🔍」或「垃圾桶 🗑️」等特殊語義圖標，否則嚴禁手動輸入圖標。使用對應的 Logger 專用方法即可。

structured_fields.action: 公開 API 函數名稱 (e.g. 'loadHighlights', 'savePage')
structured_fields.error: 錯誤物件 (Logger 會自動展開 Stack Trace)

design_decisions.no_timestamp: 單用戶場景 + Chrome DevTools 內建時間戳，FIFO LogBuffer 隱含時間順序
design_decisions.console_dx: 持久化層結構化，展示層人性化（控制台保留多參數展開行為，不強制 JSON.stringify）

execution.rationale: Do NOT run full suites. Use --no-coverage for faster feedback loops during logic fixes.

mocking.issue: TypeError: Cannot read property 'xxx' of undefined
mocking.action: Ensure mock object depth. e.g., mocking an img tag requires `dataset: {}`
Ensure methods like Logger.success or Logger.start are defined as jest.fn() in the mock setup.

assertions.rule: Target assertions against Chinese strings (user-facing messages) rather than original English API messages when using ErrorHandler.formatUserMessage.
Avoid vague string matching. Use `expect.objectContaining` to assert exact expected metadata objects for Logger calls.

checklist: Check CSS.highlights support: `'highlights' in CSS` in console.
Verify initialization log: `[INFO] ✅ [初始化] 標註系統初始化完成` or similar.
Compare stored URL with current URL using `normalizeUrl(window.location.href)`.

background_service_worker.symptom: Failing to save content to Notion.
checklist: Look for batch processing logs: `[存儲] 準備分批添加區塊: 總共 X 個`.
Verify Notion API rate limit delays between batches (350ms).

diagnosis: Check batch size logs for block counts.
Monitor Notion API response times in Network tab.

highlight_recovery.symptom: Highlights fail to restore upon revisiting a page.
root_causes: Migration not finished (`遷移完成` log missing).
Text content mutated on the source page.
